title: celmisia semicordata subsp. aurigans
intro: Celmisia semicordata subsp. aurigans is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for wound healing and skin issues. The plant's medicinal properties have been reported to reduce inflammation, fight bacterial infections, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable resource in traditional Maori medicine. Celmisia semicordata subsp. aurigans can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal benefits.
